+- Ledger: use 'note' not 'description'
+- subscriptions table: no group_id — must JOIN customers table

-1. CHECK enterprise_turns FIRST (7-day timeout!)
-2. CHECK subscribers: Any S3 Plan C subs? (CRITICAL test!)
-3. IF S3 Plan C is converting:

-7. Social media: check posts for reactions to quota fix announcement
